model_implication: Use Ashkenazi founder-history frame as the base model.

evidence: chr10 remains the clean direct tract; global models have limited resolution for a tract-level object.

evidence: Available public data lack dense late southern-Levant Jewish-context genomes; Nahal Yarmuth is low-power deep-prehistoric context.

evidence: Local objects split by evidence class and whole-genome checks remain Ashkenazi-centered.
